steps.prompt: Doctors help people who are poorly and make them feel better. They work at a hospital.
Eight o'clock — the doctor arrives and gets ready. There are lots of people to help today! Press Arrive at hospital!
Then the doctor sees patients — people who need help.
Ten o'clock — the doctor listens carefully to each person and helps them feel better. That is very important work. Press See patients!
After a busy morning, the doctor has a lunch break.
One o'clock — even doctors need to eat and rest. Just a short break before the afternoon! Press Lunch break!
Next, the doctor checks on all the patients in the afternoon.
Three o'clock — the doctor walks around checking everyone is getting better. Press Afternoon ward!
Last of all, the doctor goes home to rest.

steps.feedback: Six o'clock — the doctor's day is done. Arrive, see patients, lunch, afternoon rounds, then home. Doctors work so hard to help us all!
